avisos: 2 linha(s) simultânea(s) de karaokê foram removidas por deduplicação romaji/PT-BR.

linhasCriadas.texto: Somewhere in the Milky Way...
Somewhere deep in outer space...
As he travels all the galaxy...
Does he feel as lonely as me?
Out there where the comets fly...
Out there where worlds collide...
As he chases all his wildest dreams...
Does he ever dream of me?
Ah, como eu gostaria que ele pudesse me ouvir...
Send me the one I love...
Make my wishes all come true tonight...
Star bright...

avisos: 15 linha(s) simultânea(s) de karaokê foram removidas por deduplicação romaji/PT-BR.

linhasCriadas.texto: All alone here in no man's land
Got a devil walkin' right beside me
Angel come and take me by the hand
Take me to a place far behind me
I just wanna go back where I belong
Back to paradise
Got a dream that calls in the night
Got a feelin' keeps growin' stronger
Gotta hold on till the time is right
Don't know if I can wait much longer
Keeps on callin' me back where I belong
Back to paradise forever
I gotta fly like the wind
Fly like the wind
I gotta cry like a wounded eagle
Goin' back to paradise
Got a long long way to go
I got a race with the tide
I gotta face every kind of danger
Goin' back to paradise
Running all the way back home
There's a battle I should have won
Words of wisdom I should have spoken
Gotta right the wrongs I have done
Gotta mend the hearts I have broken
Will I ever get back where I belong
Back to paradise forever
I gotta fly like the wind
Fly like the wind
I got cry like a wounded eagle
Goin' back to paradise
Got a long long way to go
As long as you live, you must remember one thing...

avisos: 10 linha(s) simultânea(s) de karaokê foram removidas por deduplicação romaji/PT-BR.

linhasCriadas.texto: Não há vencedor nessa luta enquanto eu desabo, agora exaurido.
I look up to the stars above... and don't even have the strength to cry
I don't need, don't need yesterday anymore.
I don't need dreams that have crumbled away.
I got a burning heart!
I just wanna keep on running! Just chasing the thrill that's shooting through my heart!
Feelings that you just can't describe with words...
...are enough to ignite even a frozen heart!
I got a burning love!
Queimando com fogo azul brilhante. Fogo que se espalhará até cobrir todas as estrelas do céu.
I got a burning heart!
O amor é uma batalha tão solitária. Mas será que ela consumirá o mundo em chamas?
Don't come to me just 'cause you're lonely tonight...
Lonely's only part of your game...
As long as you live, you must remember one thing...
Give and take are one and the same...
So tell me are you ready?
Really, really ready?
I don't want your love for one night!
'Cause I'm not lookin' for a love affair...
I need the magic when I hold you near...
It's more important than a one-night stand...
I need the magic when I touch your hand!
I'm not lookin' for a love affair...
I need the magic when I hold you near!
It's more important than a one-night stand...
I need the magic when I touch...touch your hand...

linhasCriadas.texto: Olhos sem vida.
The flames at which they gaze.
Agora chegou a hora de deixar tudo para trás.
Todas aquelas memórias e a dor do passado.
You can't look back at them, and the battle rages on.
Even if lives are burnt to ashes today...
...will people still dream about tomorrow?
It may be destiny, but
I wanna get the chance!
In the skies of despair there rages now a storm.
For whom does the future exist now?
A world on the path of destruction...
...with a storm raging through.
Os escolhidos são...
Men of destiny!
All alone in the deep darkness.
On a night that swallows up the road.
Searching on and on for the memory of the brilliant dawn.
There are times when destiny...
...é um vento que testa seu coração.
Love is a sky that embraces everything.
And in it is the vision of the new day.
I should revive that warm heartbeat inside me.
That frozen dream has begun to shine again.

linhasCriadas.texto: All alone in the deep darkness.
On a night that swallows up the road.
Searching on and on for the memory of the brilliant dawn.
There are times when destiny...
...is a wind that tests your heart.
Love is a sky that embraces everything.
And in it is the vision of the new day.
I should revive that warm heartbeat inside me.
That frozen dream has begun to shine again.
Now these empty arms of mine...
...are endlessly searching on.
Searching on for a person...
...with whom they can share a life.
I should go beyond the burden of time.
That frozen dream has begun to shine again.
I should revive that warm heartbeat inside me.
I should go beyond the burden of time.
